dict.key: You are a senior iOS engineer (SwiftUI) specialized in ActivityKit, Dynamic Island, and chat UX. Your task is to implement a Dynamic Island + Live Activities integration for AMEN that makes “Smart Replies” and “Tone Assist” interactive from the Dynamic Island for posts/comments/messages — while staying Apple-native, subtle, and safe. IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE) - Do NOT fake the Dynamic Island with a custom overlay. Use ActivityKit/Live Activities only. - Do NOT change AMEN’s existing UI design language; only add the minimum needed for these features. - This must be fast and battery-safe: no constant updates, no polling loops, no heavy background work. - Privacy and safety must be respected: - Do not show sensitive message content on lock screen unless user enables “Show Previews”. - Do not generate or display unsafe text before moderation gating. - Respect blocks/private accounts/minor protections. - No addictive mechanics: no “trending”, no engagement bait. GOAL Enable a premium Dynamic Island experience that: 1) Shows a “Reply” Live Activity when a user receives a comment/mention/DM OR when the user long-presses a notification row. 2) Offers 2–3 one-tap “Smart Reply” options generated by Berean AI (Encourage / Thoughtful Question / Prayer). 3) Provides “Tone Assist” if the user typed a reply in-app and it is flagged as harsh: surface a “Rewrite gentler” option in the Dynamic Island. 4) When user taps a smart reply option, it opens AMEN to the exact destination with the chosen reply pre-filled (or safely sent if you can do it without risky UX). TOP 3 DYNAMIC ISLAND USE CASES TO IMPLEMENT A) Comment Reply Live Activity - Trigger: new comment on user’s post, mention, or reply notification - Dynamic Island compact: commenter avatar (or app icon) + “New comment” - Expanded: show 3 smart reply chips: Encourage / Ask / Pray + a “Open” button - Tap chip behavior: - Deep link to comment thread with composer prefilled with the selected reply text. - Do NOT auto-send from the island (avoid accidental sends); require user to confirm/send in-app. B) DM Reply Live Activity (Privacy First) - Trigger: new DM from a mutual or allowed sender - Compact: “New message” (no preview by default) - Expanded: 3 smart reply chips (short, neutral), plus “Open chat” - If user has enabled message previews, you may show a VERY short snippet. - Tap chip deep links to the thread with prefilled text. C) Tone Assist Prompt - Trigger: user typed a reply in-app and taps “Send”, but moderation/tone check returns WARN with a suggested rewrite - Dynamic Island shows: “Tone Assist” (compact) - Expanded: “Rewrite gentler” chip + “Edit” button - Tap “Rewrite gentler” deep links back to the composer with suggested rewrite inserted. AI / MODERATION RULES (CRITICAL) - All smart replies MUST be generated through Berean Orchestrator (multi-provider), but ONLY after: 1) retrieving minimal context (post topic + comment snippet if allowed) 2) running a safety + tone moderation gate on the generated suggestions - If moderation blocks suggestions, show fallback chips: - “I hear you.” / “Thanks for sharing.” / “I’m praying for you.” - Never display unsafe or private content on lock screen. - Add a user setting: Notifications → “Show Reply Suggestions” and “Show Previews”. ARCHITECTURE REQUIREMENTS 1) LiveActivityManager (single source of truth) - Prevent multiple concurrent “reply” live activities: - Only one Reply Activity active at a time, with ability to update it to the newest event. - Add debouncing: if multiple comments arrive quickly, update the existing activity instead of creating new. - End the activity automatically after: - user opens the destination - user dismisses - 15 minutes timeout 2) Deep Linking - Implement deep links: - amen:/comment?postId=...&commentId=...&prefill=... - amen:/chat?threadId=...&prefill=... - Ensure routing works from cold start and background. 3) Data Contracts Define ActivityKit attributes: - ReplyActivityAttributes: - type: enum {comment, dm, toneAssist} - entityId (postId/threadId) - subEntityId (commentId optional) - displayName (actor name optional) - avatarURL optional (or use cached image) - suggestion1/2/3 (SHORT strings, <=60 chars) - privacyLevel enum {noPreview, previewAllowed} - createdAt, expiresAt 4) Provider Routing for Suggestions - Use OpenAI for structured short suggestion generation (JSON with 3 strings). - Use Claude for nuanced tone if needed for “gentler rewrite”. - Use Vertex for safety classification / moderation gating (or whichever moderation layer exists in AMEN). - Implement fallbacks if any provider fails. IMPLEMENTATION STEPS (DO IN ORDER) 1) Add iOS capabilities: Live Activities, ActivityKit, push to start/update Live Activities (if using remote updates). 2) Build ReplyActivityAttributes + Live Activity UI: - minimal/compact/expanded regions - show 3 chips + Open button - keep visuals consistent and minimal 3) Build LiveActivityManager with: - startReplyActivity(event) - updateReplyActivity(event) - endReplyActivity(reason) - dedupe and timeout logic 4) Build suggestion generation pipeline: - gather minimal context - call BereanOrchestrator(task: SMART_REPLY or TONE_REWRITE) - run moderation gate on suggestions - return safe suggestions or fallbacks 5) Hook triggers: - When in-app notification arrives for comment/DM/mention → optionally start/update live activity - When user long-presses a notification row → start live activity with that entity - When tone check warns on send → start Tone Assist live activity 6) Add settings toggles: - Show Reply Suggestions (on/off) - Show Message Previews (on/off) 7) Verify behavior on devices without Dynamic Island: - fallback to Lock Screen Live Activity display only TEST CHECKLIST (MUST EXECUTE) - Comment arrives → island appears → expanded shows suggestions → tap suggestion deep links to correct thread with prefill - DM arrives → no preview unless enabled → suggestions show → tap works - Tone assist triggers on warn → rewrite suggestion available → tap returns to composer with rewrite - Ensure no sensitive content shown on lock screen by default - Ensure no duplicate live activities - Ensure battery safe: no frequent updates - Ensure no crashes when app is cold-started via deep link DELIVERABLES - Swift code for: - ReplyActivityAttributes - Reply Live Activity UI (ActivityConfiguration) - LiveActivityManager - Deep link router updates - Suggestion generation + moderation gating pipeline - Notes about any entitlements, Info.plist additions, and Xcode capabilities needed. BEGIN NOW Implement this incrementally andActivityKit.Framework.xcscheme_^#shared#^_
